OBJECT OF POWER: UR-SHULGI'S PROMISE
A black band of wrought-iron permanently affixed to Rashid's finger, causing blackened skin where it touches his flesh.
Once per story, after rolling for a Blood Sorcery power or Ritual, you may set one Hunger die to a 10.
ARCANE CURSE: MAGIC SPARKS FIRES
